chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 1434 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 15.08.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Mashori, advocate for applicant Mr. Zahoor Shah, APG ---------- Counsel for applicant submits that the matter has been compromised between the parties, hence, he does not press this bail application. This bail application is dismissed as withdrawn. J U D G E Ashraf
